results.justification: EXACT TWIN — LoRAFusion explicitly addresses mLoRA load imbalance from variable sequence lengths IS the team-LoRA dynamic load redistribution mechanism.
Gradient-based rank allocation under RL is the gradient-norm + redistribution paradigm at rank allocation granularity.
EXACT TWIN — StelLA three-factor Stiefel-manifold orthonormal LoRA IS the orthogonal-subspace team-LoRA foundation.
OA-Adapter dynamic budget adaptation + orthogonal subspace IS the dynamic load redistribution across orthogonal subspaces.
C-LoRA efficient subspace reuse + orthogonality constraints covers the cross-subspace transfer + safety-line base mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — CL-LoRA random orthogonal down-projection shared adapters + block-wise orthogonal weights IS the shared safety-line + orthogonal team mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Shared low-rank foundational subspace from past tasks + incremental integration IS the shared base safety-line + team adapter mechanism.
Distributed LoRA dynamic rebalance adapters across GPUs IS the dynamic load redistribution paradigm at serving granularity.
